subject: [CPS] Fix statefulset upgrade
commit_message:
[CPS] Fix statefulset upgrade

Remove helm chart label from timescaledb statefulset fields for which
updates are forbidden

Issue-ID: CPS-857
Change-Id: I024ef0cd8c23c477e1d43a1a4ee9c5d6d1743f3b
Signed-off-by: Bruno Sakoto <bruno.sakoto@bell.ca>
(cherry picked from commit 79a0a147fc7a0f660498bd3479e9aa4beb028672)
